introduction: It will examine how the seemingly “overnight success” of women’s professional sports was really 50 years in the making, highlighting investors and athletes alike. The film will also feature Napheesa Collier, Courtney Williams, Jane McManus, Khristina Williams and Monica McNutt in addition to  Emma Hayes, Ilona Maher, Ari Chambers, NWSL Commissioner Jessica Berman, Deloitte US Chair Lara Abrash, Laura Gentile, Andrea Brimmer and Bridget Sponsky,.
